name: Asus VY229HF (IPS Panel, Res: 1920X1080, 100Hz, 1ms MPRT)
highlights: 45” Full HD IPS Monitor delivers sharp visuals and smooth gameplay with a 1920×1080 resolution, 100Hz refresh rate, and 1ms MPRT response time
Featuring Adaptive-Sync, Eye Care+ Technology, and anti-glare display, it ensures both comfort and performance for work, play, and entertainment
With versatile connectivity (HDMI & VGA), low power consumption, and VESA mount compatibility, the VY229HF is a perfect all-round monitor for modern users
